elio-data-discovery-commands.title: Commands
elio-data-discovery-commands.commandStartedAsync: Command successfully started asynchronously in background.

indexCleanup.description: Index cleanup command is removing all unnecessary deleted entities with status 'deleted' from system which is already synchronized to the external system. It checks it by the last generation sync date of all profiles.

indexUpdate.description: Index Update is recalculating the hash of the sync-data items (product / content) in elio_data_discovery_entity_status database table.

productSortUpdate.description: The "Refresh Sort" button recalculates the sorting positions for the parent categories from child ones. It goes through all categories of the shop.

rankingUpdate.description: The "Ranking Update" button looking for orders in last configured days (default 14) within plugin configured status and calculated the ranking for the product based on ordered product count and order amount.

syncData.description: Generating the sync data for the given sync profile id <syncProfileId>. Optionally add flag -f to force the sync over the given date range interval. If extension plugin supports import API -> may also trigger the import in the external system.

excludingCategoryInheritanceUpdate.description: Synchronizing the custom-fields of 'sync-excluded'-group for the categories based on the configuration
